config.description: Заполнение реестра остатков и оборотов для формы 110

all.value:
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'client' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_client,
    MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_psreg_psregister
FROM md_entity2table
WHERE (entity_name = 'client' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg')

SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'client' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_client,
    MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_psreg_psregister
FROM md_entity2table
WHERE (entity_name = 'client' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg')

SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'client' AND module_name = 'dwh' THEN table_name END) AS table_dwh_client,
    MAX(CASE WHEN entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg' THEN table_name END) AS table_psreg_psregister
FROM md_entity2table
WHERE (entity_name = 'client' AND module_name = 'dwh') OR (entity_name = 'psregister' AND module_name = 'psreg')

param_model.name: clientchr_sql_filter
param_model.description: Фильтр на статус записи в Характерах клиента

sql_model.name: 001_RF110RestTurnReg_ACCDEMAND_vtb
sql_model.source_sql:
with /* Если клиент является адвокатом или нотариусом И одновременно управляющим, оставляем только одну запись */
                       ClientChr1_34 as 
                       (select distinct ClientID as ClientID 
		                      from {{ClientChr}}
                         where DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
		                       and DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                           and {{clientchr_sql_filter}}
		                       and ClientCharacter in (1,34) --адвокат/нотариус, арбитражный управляющий 
                       )
                  select {{RF110RestTurnReg_SR}} as ID,
                         {{calc_id}} as CalcID,
                         reg.BranchID as BranchID,
                         reg.ExternalClientID as ExternalClientID,
                         reg.RowStatus as RowStatus,
                         reg.VIP as VIP,
                         reg.AccountID as AccountID,
                         reg.ContractNumber as ContractNumber,
                         reg.DealID as DealID,
                         reg.AccountNumber as AccountNumber,
                         reg.Account2ID as Account2ID,
                         reg.Account2Number as Account2Number,
                         reg.CorrectObjectID as ObjectID,
                         reg.SumType as SumType,
                         reg.CorrectObjectBrief as ObjectBrief,
                         reg.CorrectObjectID as CorrectObjectID,
                         reg.CurrencyID as CurrencyID,
                         null as SecCategory,
                         reg.ClientID as ClientID,
                         coalesce(cjr.ClientType,reg.ClientType) as ClientType,
                         reg.Resident as ClientIsResident,
                         cjr.OwnershipFormID as ClientOwnershipFormID,
                         cjr.Authority as ClientAuthority,
                         case
                           when chr.ClientID is not null
                             then 'CMN_BIN_YES'
                           else 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                         end as IsLawyerNotary,
                         cjr.OffshoreResident as MinusLevy,
                         case
                         when coalesce(cjr.IsFinancial,'CMN_BIN_NULL') = 'CMN_BIN_NULL'
                           then 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                             else cjr.IsFinancial
                         end as IsFinOrg,
                         cjr.IsClearingMember as IsClearingMember,
                         reg.PaymentDelay as PaymentDelay,
                         reg.PaymentSumRur as OutRestRub,
                         reg.PaymentSumVal as OutRestVal,
                         reg.AccountName as AccountName,
                         reg.ClientName as ClientName,
                         NULL as LinkAccountID,
                         NULL as LinkAccountNumber,
                         NULL as LinkAccount2Number,
                         NULL as LinkCurrencyCode,
                         reg.SecurityID as SecurityID,
                         enum2str(sdr.DealKind) as LoanREPOKind,
                         null as SecKind,
                         reg.SecPortfolioID as SecPortfolioID,
                         case 
                           when reg.ClientID != acc.ClientID then 'CMN_BIN_YES'
                           else 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                         end as IsLoanGuarantor,
                         decode(cur.Type,:CUR_TP_ET_NUM:)  as CurrencyType,
                         cur.Code as CurrencyCode,
                         enum2str(acc.openingreason) as AccountOpeningReason,
                         NULL as DepositKind,
                         decode(cjr.COUNTRYCODE,'996','CMN_BIN_YES','CMN_BIN_NO') as IsInternational290FZ,
                         reg.ParentDealID,
                         reg.ParentContractNumber,
                         reg.AccountRole as AccountRole
                    from {{AssetRegisterCor}} reg
                   inner join {{RF110_Reg_Acc2}} a
                           on a.Account2Number = reg.Account2Number
                   inner join {{Account}} acc
                           on acc.ID = reg.AccountID 
                          and acc.DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
                          and acc.DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                    left join {{ClientJurRegister}} cjr
                           on cjr.CalcID = {{calc_clientjurreg_id}}
                          and cjr.ClientID = reg.ClientID 
                    left join ClientChr1_34 chr
                           on chr.ClientID = reg.ClientID
                    left join {{SecDealREPO}} sdr
                           on sdr.DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
                          and sdr.DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                          and sdr.RowStatus = 'A'
                          and sdr.MainDealID = reg.DealID
                    left join {{Currency}} cur 
                           on cur.ID = acc.CurrencyID
                   where reg.CalcID = {{calc_astreg_id}}
                     and reg.LevelGroup = 0
                     and reg.RowStatus = 'A'
                     and (substr(reg.Account2Number,1,3) = '706' or abs(reg.ParentAccountID) != 1 )

with /* Если клиент является адвокатом или нотариусом И одновременно управляющим, оставляем только одну запись */
                       ClientChr1_34 as

		                       and DateEnd > {{date_end}}

                  select {{RF110RestTurnReg_SR}} as ID,

                         cjr.Authority as ClientAuthority,
                         case
                           when chr.ClientID is not null
                             then 'CMN_BIN_YES'
                           else 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                         end as IsLawyerNotary,
                         cjr.OffshoreResident as MinusLevy,
                         case
                         when coalesce(cjr.IsFinancial,'CMN_BIN_NULL') = 'CMN_BIN_NULL'
                           then 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                             else cjr.IsFinancial
                         end as IsFinOrg,
                         cjr.IsClearingMember as IsClearingMember,
                         reg.PaymentDelay as PaymentDelay,
                         reg.PaymentSumRur as OutRestRub,
                         reg.PaymentSumVal as OutRestVal,
                         reg.AccountName as AccountName,
                         reg.ClientName as ClientName,
                         NULL as LinkAccountID,
                         NULL as LinkAccountNumber,
                         NULL as LinkAccount2Number,
                         NULL as LinkCurrencyCode,
                         reg.SecurityID as SecurityID,
                         enum2str(sdr.DealKind) as LoanREPOKind,
                         null as SecKind,
                         reg.SecPortfolioID as SecPortfolioID,
                         case 
                           when reg.ClientID != acc.ClientID then 'CMN_BIN_YES'
                           else 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                         end as IsLoanGuarantor,
                         cur.Type  as CurrencyType,
                         cur.Code as CurrencyCode,
                         enum2str(acc.openingreason) as AccountOpeningReason,
                         NULL as DepositKind,
                         DECODE(cjr.COUNTRYCODE, '996', 'CMN_BIN_YES', 'CMN_BIN_NO') as IsInternational290FZ,
                         reg.ParentDealID,
                         reg.ParentContractNumber,
                         reg.AccountRole as AccountRole
                    from {{AssetRegisterCor}} reg
                   inner join {{RF110_Reg_Acc2}} a
                           on a.Account2Number = reg.Account2Number
                   inner join {{Account}} acc
                           on acc.ID = reg.AccountID 
                          and acc.DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
                          and acc.DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                    left join {{ClientJurRegister}} cjr
                           on cjr.CalcID = {{calc_clientjurreg_id}}
                          and cjr.ClientID = reg.ClientID 
                    left join ClientChr1_34 chr
                           on chr.ClientID = reg.ClientID
                    left join {{SecDealREPO}} sdr
                           on sdr.DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
                          and sdr.DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                          and sdr.RowStatus = 'A'
                          and sdr.MainDealID = reg.DealID
                    left join {{Currency}} cur 
                           on cur.ID = acc.CurrencyID
                   where reg.CalcID = {{calc_astreg_id}}
                     and reg.LevelGroup = 0
                     and reg.RowStatus = 'A'
                     and (substr(reg.Account2Number,1,3) = '706' or abs(reg.ParentAccountID) != 1 )

rendered_sql.adb:
INSERT INTO RF110RestTurnReg (dealid, accountid, objectid, calcid, accountnumber, clientid, loanrepokind, somerequiredattribute)
SELECT dealid, accountid, objectid, calcid, accountnumber, clientid, loanrepokind, 'test' as somerequiredattribute
FROM (
                      with /* Если клиент является адвокатом или нотариусом И одновременно управляющим, оставляем только одну запись */
                       ClientChr1_34 as 
                       (select distinct ClientID as ClientID 
		                      from {{ClientChr}}
                         where DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
		                       and DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                           and {{clientchr_sql_filter}}
		                       and ClientCharacter in (1,34) --адвокат/нотариус, арбитражный управляющий 
                       )
                  select {{RF110RestTurnReg_SR}} as ID,
                         {{calc_id}} as CalcID,
                         reg.BranchID as BranchID,
                         reg.ExternalClientID as ExternalClientID,
                         reg.RowStatus as RowStatus,
                         reg.VIP as VIP,
                         reg.AccountID as AccountID,
                         reg.ContractNumber as ContractNumber,
                         reg.DealID as DealID,
                         reg.AccountNumber as AccountNumber,
                         reg.Account2ID as Account2ID,
                         reg.Account2Number as Account2Number,
                         reg.CorrectObjectID as ObjectID,
                         reg.SumType as SumType,
                         reg.CorrectObjectBrief as ObjectBrief,
                         reg.CorrectObjectID as CorrectObjectID,
                         reg.CurrencyID as CurrencyID,
                         null as SecCategory,
                         reg.ClientID as ClientID,
                         coalesce(cjr.ClientType,reg.ClientType) as ClientType,
                         reg.Resident as ClientIsResident,
                         cjr.OwnershipFormID as ClientOwnershipFormID,
                         cjr.Authority as ClientAuthority,
                         case
                           when chr.ClientID is not null
                             then 'CMN_BIN_YES'
                           else 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                         end as IsLawyerNotary,
                         cjr.OffshoreResident as MinusLevy,
                         case
                         when coalesce(cjr.IsFinancial,'CMN_BIN_NULL') = 'CMN_BIN_NULL'
                           then 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                             else cjr.IsFinancial
                         end as IsFinOrg,
                         cjr.IsClearingMember as IsClearingMember,
                         reg.PaymentDelay as PaymentDelay,
                         reg.PaymentSumRur as OutRestRub,
                         reg.PaymentSumVal as OutRestVal,
                         reg.AccountName as AccountName,
                         reg.ClientName as ClientName,
                         NULL as LinkAccountID,
                         NULL as LinkAccountNumber,
                         NULL as LinkAccount2Number,
                         NULL as LinkCurrencyCode,
                         reg.SecurityID as SecurityID,
                         enum2str(sdr.DealKind) as LoanREPOKind,
                         null as SecKind,
                         reg.SecPortfolioID as SecPortfolioID,
                         case 
                           when reg.ClientID != acc.ClientID then 'CMN_BIN_YES'
                           else 'CMN_BIN_NO'
                         end as IsLoanGuarantor,
                         cur.Type  as CurrencyType,
                         cur.Code as CurrencyCode,
                         enum2str(acc.openingreason) as AccountOpeningReason,
                         NULL as DepositKind,
                         DECODE(cjr.COUNTRYCODE, '996', 'CMN_BIN_YES', 'CMN_BIN_NO') as IsInternational290FZ,
                         reg.ParentDealID,
                         reg.ParentContractNumber,
                         reg.AccountRole as AccountRole
                    from {{AssetRegisterCor}} reg
                   inner join {{RF110_Reg_Acc2}} a
                           on a.Account2Number = reg.Account2Number
                   inner join {{Account}} acc
                           on acc.ID = reg.AccountID 
                          and acc.DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
                          and acc.DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                    left join {{ClientJurRegister}} cjr
                           on cjr.CalcID = {{calc_clientjurreg_id}}
                          and cjr.ClientID = reg.ClientID 
                    left join ClientChr1_34 chr
                           on chr.ClientID = reg.ClientID
                    left join {{SecDealREPO}} sdr
                           on sdr.DateBegin <= {{date_end}}
                          and sdr.DateEnd > {{date_end}}
                          and sdr.RowStatus = 'A'
                          and sdr.MainDealID = reg.DealID
                    left join {{Currency}} cur 
                           on cur.ID = acc.CurrencyID
                   where reg.CalcID = {{calc_astreg_id}}
                     and reg.LevelGroup = 0
                     and reg.RowStatus = 'A'
                     and (substr(reg.Account2Number,1,3) = '706' or abs(reg.ParentAccountID) != 1 )

) t

sql_model.name: 001_RF110RestTurnReg_INN
sql_model.source_sql:
select c.clientid,
       c.inn as clientinn
from _m.dwh.client c
where c.clienttype = 'ЮЛ'

prepared_sql.adb:
select c.clientid,
       c.inn as clientinn
from {{ table_dwh_client }} c
where c.clienttype = 'ЮЛ'

rendered_sql.adb:
UPDATE RF110RestTurnReg trg
SET clientinn = src.clientinn 
FROM (
    select c.clientid,
       c.inn as clientinn
from {{ table_dwh_client }} c
where c.clienttype = 'ЮЛ'
) src
WHERE trg.calcid = {{CALC_ID}} AND trg.clientid = src.clientid

sql_model.name: sql_002_Update_001_RF110RestTurnReg_QUALITY_b_vtb
sql_model.source_sql:
/*
@config(
              cte_materialization:
                 default: ephemeral
                 by_context: 
                   vtb: stage_calcid                                     
              attributes:
                 - name : t
                   domain_type: number
                   distribution_key: 1
)                   
*/    
    select 1 as t from tbl

functions.name: CONFIG
params:
cte_materialization:
                 default: ephemeral
                 by_context: 
                   vtb: stage_calcid                                     
              attributes:
                 - name : t
                   domain_type: number
                   distribution_key: 1

rendered_sql.adb:
CREATE TABLE tmp_sql_002_Update_001_RF110RestTurnReg_QUALITY_b_vtb_{{calc_id}} AS
SELECT 
    RF110.get_base_calc_id() as CalcID,
    t.*
FROM (
        
    select 1 as t from tbl
) t
DISTRIBUTED BY (t)

sql_model.name: 001_RF110RestTurnReg_QUALITY
sql_model.source_sql:
/*
@config(
  description: обновление категории качества
)                   
*/    

with b as (
/*
@config(
              cte_materialization:
                 default: ephemeral
                 by_context: 
                   vtb: stage_calcid                                     
              attributes:
                 - name : t
                   domain_type: number
                   distribution_key: 1
)                   
*/    
    select 1 as t from tbl)
select r.DealID,
       r.FinInstrCategory,
       r.DateFrom
from _m.PSReg.PSRegister r
where r.CalcID = {{calc_psregister_id}}
and r.RowStatus = 'A'
and r.tt in (select 1 from b)

functions.name: CONFIG
params:
cte_materialization:
                 default: ephemeral
                 by_context: 
                   vtb: stage_calcid                                     
              attributes:
                 - name : t
                   domain_type: number
                   distribution_key: 1

prepared_sql.adb:
select r.DealID,
       r.FinInstrCategory,
       r.DateFrom
from {{ table_psreg_psregister }} r
where r.CalcID = {{calc_psregister_id}}
and r.RowStatus = 'A'
and r.tt in (select 1 FROM tmp_sql_002_Update_001_RF110RestTurnReg_QUALITY_b_vtb_{{calc_id}})

rendered_sql.adb:
UPDATE RF110RestTurnReg trg
SET datefrom = src.datefrom, fininstrcategory = src.fininstrcategory 
FROM (
        

select r.DealID,
       r.FinInstrCategory,
       r.DateFrom
from {{ table_psreg_psregister }} r
where r.CalcID = {{calc_psregister_id}}
and r.RowStatus = 'A'
and r.tt in (select 1 FROM tmp_sql_002_Update_001_RF110RestTurnReg_QUALITY_b_vtb_{{calc_id}})
) src
WHERE trg.calcid = {{CALC_ID}} AND trg.dealid = src.dealid
